::: {.callout-tip}
## Sync your Git Repository

At the beginning of each practical, make sure to pull any changes in the main copy of online repository from GitHub.

1. Log in to GitHub and navigate to your fork of the MB1A_Students repository.
2. Click on "Sync Fork".
3. If it shows "This branch is not behind the upstream" there is nothing else you need to do.
4. Otherwise, click `Update Branch`.
5. Go to your RStudio session and open the `Git` tab.
6. Click `Pull` to update your local copy of the repository.

:::
